creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
Created attachment 256640
Screenshot of current behavior with transparent background

Not having used virtualbox on this machine for a long time I thought I could probably close this with "overcome by events". So I started up a VM. The astonishing result is that now I get a console with white text on a perfectly transparent background (I can move the window around and the background keeps shining through properly; however, the preview does not change).

Starting X in this VM (using scfb) keeps the transparency, and starting "oclock -jewel red -geometry 400x400" gives an oclock with white background, transparent hands, and a jewel which is sometimes red depending on the transparent background color.

It's sort of pretty but not very usable...

Screenshot attached.

-- Martin
